[PDF_PAGE 61 | score=5] Hag ments. Any creature fortunate (or unfortunate) enough to resist a covey is immediately devoured. A covey of hags is 80% likely to be guarded by a mixture of 1d8 ogres and 1d4 evil giants. Coveys often use one or two of their ogres as spies, sending them into the world beyond after poly- morphing them into less threatening creatures. These minions frequently (60%) wear a special magical gem called а hag eye. A hag eye is made from the real eye of a covey's previous victim. It appears to the casual observer to be no more than a low-value gem (20 gp or less), but if viewed through a gem of true seeing, a disembodied eye can be seen trapped in the hag eye's interior. This hidden eye is magic
